steps.title: Identify the comparison structure
steps.content: The opening declares “I have less need now than when I was young” — a direct comparison between the speaker's past and present. This comparison sets up what should follow: examples of what she needed then but doesn't now.

steps.title: Recognize the examples that illustrate the shift
steps.content:
The underlined portion lists two specific behaviors (sharing herself with every comer, shaping thoughts into words) that exemplify what the speaker needed to do in youth but no longer does.

The other three choices misidentify the function by either ignoring the past/present contrast or treating this as a recalled episode.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
